title: Pinakbet Filipino Vegetable Stew
description: A flavorful and classic Filipino vegetable stew originating from the Ilocos region. This hearty dish is made with a variety of vegetables and a savory bagoong sauce.

ingredients.name: pork belly or baby back ribs
ingredients.notes: you can also use pork shoulders

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the pork belly or baby back ribs and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the bagoong sauce and stir well.
Add the eggplant, okra, long green chili peppers, and tomatoes. Stir well.
Cook for 10 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the spinach and cook until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
